title: trisetum cavanillesii
intro: Trisetum cavanillesii, also known as Cavanilles' oatgrass, is a perennial grass species native to the Iberian Peninsula. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs due to its expectorant properties. The health benefits of Trisetum cavanillesii include reducing inflammation and relieving symptoms associated with colds and flu. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare infusions or decoctions, which are often used to treat respiratory issues, and it can also be found in some herbal supplements in the form of capsules or tinctures.
